text: How confident are you in your ability to analyse complex problems and find logical solutions?
How confident are you in your ability to come up with original ideas and creative approaches?
How confident are you in your ability to connect with people and build strong working relationships?
How confident are you working with technology, tools, or technical systems?
How confident are you in roles that require physical stamina or hands-on work?
How confident are you in your ability to spot opportunities and take initiative on new ideas?
How confident are you in your ability to stay organised and follow processes under pressure?
How confident are you in your ability to support and advocate for people who need help?
How well do you think you'd cope with a career spent mostly outdoors or in varied locations?
How confident are you in your ability to lead a team and make important decisions?
